docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY BLACKWELL, KISHA AS TO DEFENDANT AEROPOSTLE, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLACKWELL, KISHA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLACKWELL, KISHA AS TO DEFENDANT AEROPOSTLE, INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF = SIGNED SERVED AUG-17-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AEROPOSTLE, INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AEROPOSTLE, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROXANA DELATORE---ASSISTANT MANGER. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLACKWELL, KISHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AEROPOSTLE, INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
